profile.name: Yan Oleksiuk
profile.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
profile.bio: I build modern websites and web applications for businesses like cafés, salons, and service companies. React • TypeScript • Symfony • MySQL • Docker

projects.title: La Bella — Restaurant Website
projects.description: Demo restaurant website with multilingual support (EN/DE/UK), menu, reservation form and modern dark design.

projects.title: BarberKing — Barbershop Website
projects.description: Demo barbershop website with brutal dark design, services, team and online booking form.

projects.title: APEX MOTOR — Elite Auto Service
projects.description: Premium auto service site with dark navy panel, fixed sidebar navigation, services list, team, reviews and booking form. EN/DE/UK.

projects.title: Brew & Soul — Café Website
projects.description: Editorial café site with warm off-white design, live date/time widget, today's special dish, menu and booking. EN/DE/UK.

projects.title: Sultan Döner — Kebab Restaurant
projects.description: Street food brand site with dark green & orange palette, fire particle effects, diagonal sections, and a fullscreen overlay menu modal.

projects.title: VoltGarage — Auto Service
projects.description: Tech auto service site with cyan/navy design, glitch text, scan lines, counter stats, and a bottom-sheet services modal.
